content: vite-plugin-pwa pitfalls: (1) Plugin installed but not imported/configured in vite.config.ts - currently the case. (2) Missing manifest.json with required fields: name, short_name, description, theme_color, icons (192x192 and 512x512). (3) Missing PWA icons in public/ directory - only Vite favicon exists. (4) index.html missing apple-touch-icon link, theme-color meta tag, viewport-fit=cover. (5) registerType must be set (autoUpdate vs prompt) - affects update behavior. (6) devOptions.enabled needed for testing in dev mode. (7) manifest theme_color must match meta theme-color in index.html. (8) iOS standalone mode still shows status bar - display:fullscreen not fully supported. (9) Need 192x192, 512x512 manifest icons, 180x180 apple-touch-icon. (10) overscroll-behavior:none needed to prevent rubber-band scroll in standalone mode.
